/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -O3 -DNDEBUG --generate-code=arch=compute_52,code=[compute_52,sm_52] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/flash_attention_cutlass_demo.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/flash_attention_cutlass_demo.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/flash_attention_cutlass_demo.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
